mapper.select: ORDER BY A.SORT_LVL, A.SORT_ODR, A.EXAM_CTGR_LV, A.EXAM_CTGR_SEQ

/* SQL ID : ExamQbankQstnDAO.selectQbankQstnNos 설 명 : 문제은행 특정 분류코드 문제 순서 조회 */ SELECT NVL(MAX(QSTN_SEQNO), 0) + 1 AS QSTN_SEQNO , 1 AS CNDDT_ID FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_QSTN WHERE EXAM_QBNK_CTGRCD = #{examQbankCtgrCd} AND DELYN = 'N'
AND CRS_ID = #{crsNo}
/* SQL ID : ExamQbankQstnDAO.selectKey 설 명 : 문항 키 생성 */ SELECT NVL(MAX(QBNK_QSTN_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_QSTN
